win_condition: First to reach Threat dial Victory, first to 50 VP, or most VP when 5 regions ruined. If Old World deck runs out, all players lose.

categories.label: Domination VP
categories.description: Victory points scored for dominating regions (exceeding Resistance with highest domination value)

categories.label: Ruination VP
categories.description: Victory points scored when a region is ruined (ruiner bonus + 1st/2nd place corruption)

categories.label: Threat Dial VP
categories.description: Victory points scored from Threat dial advancement instructions

categories.label: Other VP (Cards/Effects)
categories.description: Victory points from Chaos card effects, Old World card effects, or other sources
